{{Quote|This is governor Vikar Dorn of the Galactic Alliance aboard the Star Destroyer Dauntless, I wish to offer my service, the service of this crew, and this ship to the rightful Emperor.|Vikar Dorn|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 13" />}}
'''Vikar Dorn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] from [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]] who formerly served the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] until he swore his allegiance to [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]].

==Biography==
Vikar Dorn served under the banner of the late [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], though he maintained his position during the rule of the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empire]],<ref name="CSWE" /> as the latter system needed the Alliance's bureaucracy to manage the galaxy following the [[Sith–Imperial War]]. Dorn's [[Dorn (captain)|son]] was [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)|''Dauntless'']].<ref name="Legacy (2006) 13" />

[[File:MaladiKillsDorn-Leg13.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Vikar Dorn is eliminated by Lady Maladi]]
In [[137 ABY]], [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Darth Maladi]] used him in an attempt to [[Duel on Bastion|infiltrate]] [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] and have [[Darth Kruhl]] kill [[Roan Fel]] using the defection of Governor Dorn and the entire crew of the ''Dauntless'' as bait. However, Kruhl's mission failed and the Sith Lord was killed by Roan Fel himself. With the treachery discovered, Emperor Fel had the entire crew of the ''Dauntless'' [[Dauntless crew killing|executed]] with only Governor Dorn being spared.<ref name="Legacy (2006) 13" />

Dorn was dropped off in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] close to Krayt-loyal ships and made his way back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], carrying Kruhl's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] with him. After revealing what happened to Lady Maladi and assuring her that he had not spoken to anyone else, he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the Sith Lady herself.<ref name="Legacy (2006) 13" />
